baseAbility.name: Counter Punch
baseAbility.description: Ready an action (no separate action cost beyond readying) to strike the next enemy who hits you with a non-maneuver melee attack before your next turn, with a light melee weapon or unarmed strike. This counter punch gets a +2 competence bonus to damage (+2 more per 4 BAB) and resolves before the triggering attack. Doesn't change your place in initiative. You can apply one (counter) talent to each counter punch, and can add extra trigger conditions beyond 'got hit in melee' as you gain more talents.

talents.name: Extra Trigger
talents.description: Add another condition that can trigger your counter punch, such as an enemy attempting a combat maneuver against you.

talents.name: Forceful Smash (counter)
talents.description: A successful counter punch also lets you attempt a free bull rush against the target.

talents.name: Loopy Blow (counter)
talents.description: A successful counter punch forces a Fortitude save or the target is staggered and briefly can't take attacks of opportunity.

talents.name: Knuckle Crusher (counter)
talents.description: A successful counter punch can impede the target's ability to speak, disrupting verbal spellcasting or commands.

talents.name: Off Balance (counter)
talents.description: A successful counter punch forces an Acrobatics check on the target's next big move or they fall prone.

talents.name: Launching Uppercut (counter)
talents.description: A successful counter punch launches the target into the air, setting up follow-up aerial attacks with other talents.

talents.name: Comeback (counter)
talents.description: Extends counter punch triggers to readied Intimidate demoralize actions, Warleader shouts, or feints, dealing bonus nonlethal damage on a hit.

talents.name: Willbreaker (counter)
talents.description: Expend martial focus on a successful counter punch to inflict a short-term penalty on the trigger action if the target fails a Will save.

talents.name: Improved Counter Punch
talents.description: Increase the competence damage bonus your counter punch grants.

talents.name: Iron Fists
talents.description: Your unarmed strikes count as magic (and later, other materials) for overcoming damage reduction, and deal damage as if you were a size category larger for these purposes.
